text:
ashish      2010-07-21 03:27:25 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    science              Makefile 
  Added files:
    science/qelectrotech Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  QElectroTech is a Qt4 application to design electric diagrams. It uses XML
  files for elements and diagrams, and includes both a diagram editor and an
  element editor.
  
  WWW:    http://qelectrotech.org/
  
  PR:             ports/146513
  Submitted by:   Gvozdikov Veniamin <g.veniamin at googlemail.com>
  Approved by:    tabthorpe (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.192     +1 -0      ports/science/Makefile
  1.1       +42 -0     ports/science/qelectrotech/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/science/qelectrotech/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/science/qelectrotech/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +342 -0    ports/science/qelectrotech/pkg-plist (new)
